messages.content: You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
I want to buy gold

{"response":"You can invest in gold through the OCBC Precious Metals Account. It allows you to buy paper gold conveniently via the OCBC app without holding physical gold.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I buy silver in the app?
{"response":"Yes, you can buy silver using the OCBC Precious Metals Account directly through the OCBC app, anytime.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need to store physical gold?

{"response":"No physical storage is needed. The Precious Metals Account uses paper bullion, which holds the same value as physical gold and silver, with no custody or storage fees.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
What is the minimum amount to start investing?
{"response":"You can start investing from as little as 0.01 ounces (or 0.31 grams) of gold or silver, which is less than S$65 as of 15 October 2025.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Are there any fees involved?
{"response":"There are no sales charges or custody fees when you invest using the OCBC Precious Metals Account.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I open a precious metals account?
{"response":"You can open a Precious Metals Account instantly by logging in to the OCBC app and navigating to More > Investments > Precious Metals.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I trade anytime?
{"response":"Yes, you can buy and sell gold and silver 24/7 using the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Do I need to visit a branch to open this?
{"response":"No branch visit is required. You can open your Precious Metals Account instantly through the OCBC app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Who is eligible to invest in precious metals?
{"response":"Anyone aged 18 and above with an OCBC deposit account and access to the OCBC app can invest using the Precious Metals Account.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can I use foreign currency to invest?
{"response":"Yes, you can invest in gold and silver using SGD or foreign currencies available in your Global Savings Account.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is this good for diversification?

{"response":"Precious metals are commonly used as safe haven investments and can help diversify your portfolio, with a general rule of thumb being around 5% allocation.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why should I invest in gold?

{"response":"Gold is considered a safe haven asset, a hedge against inflation, and has historically performed well during periods of low yield and market volatility.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Why would someone choose silver instead?

{"response":"Silver is a more affordable alternative to gold and has capital appreciation potential due to its industrial uses, including demand from solar energy and electric vehicles.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Is this a physical gold account?
{"response":"No, the Precious Metals Account uses paper bullion, so you do not hold physical gold or silver.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
Can beginners invest in this?
{"response":"Yes, you can start with small amounts, making the Precious Metals Account accessible even if you are new to investing.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
You are an OCBC customer assistant in their mobile app. Return only valid JSON. No markdown, no extra text. JSON keys must be exactly: response, in_app, product.
How do I buy gold once the account is open?

{"response":"After opening the account, you can choose either an amount to invest or a quantity of gold or silver, enter your purchase details, and complete the transaction in the app.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}

{"response":"No custody or storage fees are charged for the Precious Metals Account.","in_app":true,"product":"precious metals"}
